---
title: "Louisa Mary Knightley of Fawsley"
---

## Louisa Mary Knightley of Fawsley

**Dates:** (1842-1913)

**Maiden name:** (Bowater), Lady

### Description

suffrage campaigner

### Biography

A cousin of the feminist campaigner Jessie Boucherett, she married (1869) Sir Rainald Knightley, who was created (1892) 1st Lord Knightley of Fawsley; she was on the GFS Executive Committee, and on the SPEW Committee 1875-1890, 1894.

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
